tables.title: 典型生存假设
tables.note: 按截图式读法：1号保留到第5回合，4号保留到第4回合；后续大概率已被击杀，故省略。

tables.title: 二阶段：PlowPower 被打破后
tables.note: 仪式兽二阶段触发回合由玩家把 PlowPower 打破时决定；此表从 STUN_MOVE/二阶段入口开始计第1回合。

notes: Default tables are complete turn schedules and do not assume monster deaths unless a table override says so.
Use slotActiveThroughTurn to omit killed monsters with '-' after a chosen turn.
Use slotStartStateIds to start a phase table from a non-default state such as a transformation or stun entry.
